operation.title: Self-checking RTL test
operation.summary: Compile, elaborate, and run one explicitly declared self-checking HDL testbench with bounded evidence.

assertion.statement: The exact ordered HDL source set compiles and elaborates for the declared top, and that self-checking test executable exits zero.
non_goals: A passing declared test does not establish exhaustive functional correctness, synthesis correctness, formal proof, coverage closure, timing, CDC safety, or specification closure.
Exit zero is meaningful only because the caller declares the top to be self-checking; OpenADA does not infer that assertions or stimulus are adequate.
This profile does not run cocotb, UVM, arbitrary shell commands, vendor libraries, VPI modules, waveform post-processing, or user-selected native flags.

pass.meaning: Both bounded stages completed with exit code zero, complete logs, stable inputs, stable dependency closure, and stable tool identities.
required_evidence: Compile and run stage records, fresh complete transcripts, executable artifact, bound HDL inputs, and tool identities are retained.

fail.meaning: A trustworthy compile/elaboration stage or self-checking run completed nonzero.
required_evidence: The failed stage, native exit code, complete transcript, stable inputs, and stable tool identities are retained.

unknown.meaning: The request, tools, execution, capture, artifact, or stability evidence is insufficient for pass or fail.
required_evidence: A bounded diagnostic identifies the missing, unsafe, incomplete, unstable, or unavailable evidence.

configuration_roles.description: Ordered HDL design and self-checking testbench sources.
Optional include roots whose resolved literal dependencies are hashed.

semantic_constraints: Source order, top, include roots, and defines are explicit; no arbitrary native flag or shell fragment is accepted.
Icarus uses the fixed -g2012 frontend and vvp runtime; Verilator uses fixed --binary --timing compilation.
Compile and run each receive the declared finite timeout and four-mebibyte per-stream capture bound.
Fresh transcripts and executable outputs must not overwrite inputs.

facts.description: Ordered compile and optional run stage commands, statuses, exits, durations, and capture completeness.
Whether every captured HDL input retained its digest.
Whether compiler and separate runtime identities remained stable.

integrity: Exclusive creation from complete bounded compiler output.
Exclusive creation from complete bounded test output.
artifact_roles.native_authority: Authoritative self-checking runtime output and exit evidence.

integrity: Produced in the isolated output tree and retained by digest.
artifact_roles.native_authority: The exact generated test executable passed to the runtime.

integrity_rules: Hash HDL inputs before execution and rehash plus rescan the dependency closure afterward.
Bind compiler and runtime executable identities across version probes and execution.
Reject truncated, invalid UTF-8, missing, stale, oversized, or changed evidence as unknown.
provenance_limitations: The Verilator mapping transitively invokes its installed build toolchain, which v1alpha1 does not enumerate or hash.
Literal include scanning cannot attest macro-computed include selection.
A self-checking exit code does not measure test adequacy or coverage.

features.request_effect: Select one fixed compile/elaborate/run mapping without accepting arbitrary native flags.
features.conformance_case: Replay the same public self-checking HDL test to pass and controlled compile and assertion failures on both pinned backends.

diagnostics.condition: A required source, top, define, backend, timeout, or fresh output binding is invalid.
diagnostics.next_action: Correct the explicit bounded request and rerun.

diagnostics.condition: A compiler or required runtime is missing or fails product/version validation.
A stage timed out, failed to launch, truncated output, or emitted invalid UTF-8.
diagnostics.next_action: Repair the runtime or choose a justified bound and rerun.

diagnostics.condition: A required log or executable is absent, changed, or outside bounds.
diagnostics.next_action: Use a protected fresh output directory and rerun.

diagnostics.condition: A bound HDL input changed during execution.
diagnostics.next_action: Freeze the source tree and rerun.

diagnostics.condition: A bound compiler or runtime identity changed during execution.
diagnostics.next_action: Freeze the tool installation and rerun.

semantic_bindings.implementation: Compile in fixed Icarus -g2012 mode and execute the result with identity-validated vvp.

native_actions: Compile and elaborate with fixed -g2012, explicit top, includes, defines, and ordered sources.
Run the generated vvp program with the identity-validated vvp runtime.
limitations: Only the fixed Icarus SystemVerilog 2012 mode is exposed.
VPI modules and arbitrary native flags are unsupported.

semantic_bindings.implementation: Compile with fixed Verilator --binary --timing options and execute the generated native binary.

native_actions: Compile and elaborate with fixed --binary --timing, explicit top, includes, defines, and ordered sources.
Run the generated native test executable directly.
limitations: The transitive native compiler and make toolchain are not individually enumerated in v1alpha1.

normative_surfaces: ordered HDL inputs and declared self-checking top
fixed backend command mappings and exit-zero policy
bounded fresh compile, run, and executable evidence
compatibility.change_policy: Any change to pass meaning, backend commands, input semantics, environment, evidence bounds, or normalized facts requires a new profile identifier.
